videos.title: The first part of this video was from after I had a seizure in Februa...
videos.description: The first part of this video was from after I had a seizure in February and I so badly was trying to remember what it felt like to feel normal because I always feel so weird after having seizures. So I was like I should make a transition video for when I finally feel normal again and I felt like now was a good time to complete it because I feel so happy and so much more myself and this healing journey is going absolutely beautifully because I’ve been here with myself the whole time knowing things would get better and they have :)✨
